did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Erotic pin up posters of women, two showing women together, published by a British company, GB Posters.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Erotic pin up posters of women, two showing women together, published by a British company, GB Posters.
